title: Chart and table deck regression
description: Small deterministic regression case for producing a deck with chart and table evidence.

question.query: Create a 5 slide deck from the attached sales data. Include one chart, one table, a summary slide, and one recommendation slide. Keep it in widescreen format.
question.query_chinese: 根据附件中的销售数据制作一份 5 页 PPT。包含一个图表、一个表格、一页摘要，以及一页建议。保持宽屏格式。

metadata.source: Promoted from capability set after stable deterministic passing.
